script:
set +e
SHORT="aixa"
LU="aixa"

echo "== 1. Create $LU user + groups =="
if id "$LU" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "  user exists, uid=$(id -u $LU)"
else
  sudo useradd -m -s /bin/bash $LU
  echo "  created uid=$(id -u $LU)"
fi
sudo usermod -a -G azureuser $LU
sudo chmod g+rx /home/azureuser
sudo chmod -R g+rX /home/azureuser/.claude
sudo chmod g+r /home/azureuser/.claude.json
sudo chmod -R g+rX /home/azureuser/.npm-global

echo
echo "== 2. Symlinks + .azure for managed identity =="
sudo -u $LU ln -sfn /home/azureuser/.claude /home/$LU/.claude
sudo -u $LU ln -sfn /home/azureuser/.claude.json /home/$LU/.claude.json
sudo cp -r /home/azureuser/.azure /home/$LU/.azure 2>/dev/null
sudo chown -R $LU:$LU /home/$LU/.azure

echo
echo "== 3. Stop existing services =="
sudo systemctl stop ${SHORT}-bot.service ${SHORT}-responder.service 2>/dev/null

echo
echo "== 4. Move bot files into /home/$LU/ =="
for f in ${SHORT}-bot.py ${SHORT}-responder.py ${SHORT}-graph-token.sh ${SHORT}-send-to.sh ${SHORT}-remember.sh ${SHORT}-install-chat-app.sh; do
  [ -f /home/azureuser/$f ] && sudo mv /home/azureuser/$f /home/$LU/
done
[ -d /home/azureuser/.${SHORT}-bot ] && sudo mv /home/azureuser/.${SHORT}-bot /home/$LU/
[ -d /home/azureuser/${SHORT}-teams-app ] && sudo cp -r /home/azureuser/${SHORT}-teams-app /home/$LU/

echo
echo "== 5. Sed-replace azureuser->$LU paths =="
for f in /home/$LU/${SHORT}-bot.py /home/$LU/${SHORT}-responder.py /home/$LU/${SHORT}-*.sh; do
  [ -f "$f" ] && sudo sed -i "s|/home/azureuser/\.${SHORT}-bot|/home/$LU/.${SHORT}-bot|g; s|/home/azureuser/${SHORT}-|/home/$LU/${SHORT}-|g" "$f"
done

echo
echo "== 6. Chown all moved files =="
sudo chown -R $LU:$LU /home/$LU/${SHORT}-bot.py /home/$LU/${SHORT}-responder.py /home/$LU/${SHORT}-*.sh /home/$LU/.${SHORT}-bot /home/$LU/${SHORT}-teams-app 2>/dev/null
sudo chmod 600 /home/$LU/.${SHORT}-bot/creds.json 2>/dev/null

echo
echo "== 7. Read existing PORT + write new systemd units =="
PORT=$(systemctl show ${SHORT}-bot.service -p Environment --value 2>/dev/null | tr ' ' '\n' | grep PORT= | head -1 | cut -d= -f2)
[ -z "$PORT" ] && PORT=$(sudo grep -oE 'PORT=[0-9]+' /etc/systemd/system/${SHORT}-bot.service 2>/dev/null | head -1 | cut -d= -f2)
echo "  PORT=$PORT"
for unit in ${SHORT}-bot ${SHORT}-responder; do
  UF=/etc/systemd/system/${unit}.service
  sudo tee $UF > /dev/null <<UNIT
[Unit]
Description=${unit} (per-user Linux account: ${LU})
After=network-online.target $(if [ "$unit" = "${SHORT}-responder" ]; then echo "${SHORT}-bot.service"; fi)
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=${LU}
WorkingDirectory=/home/${LU}
Environment=HOME=/home/${LU}
Environment=PATH=/home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin
$(if [ "$unit" = "${SHORT}-bot" ]; then echo "Environment=PORT=${PORT}"; fi)
ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /home/${LU}/${unit}.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
UNIT
done
sudo systemctl daemon-reload

echo
echo "== 8. Start services =="
sudo systemctl start ${SHORT}-bot.service ${SHORT}-responder.service
sleep 4
echo "  bot: $(systemctl is-active ${SHORT}-bot.service)"
echo "  responder: $(systemctl is-active ${SHORT}-responder.service)"

echo
echo "== 9. Verify $LU az login works =="
sudo -u $LU az account show --query name -o tsv 2>&1 | head -1
